summaryKo.oneLine: 2025년 연간 EBIT-adjusted 127억 달러(가이던스 상단 초과); 순이익 27억 달러; 조정 자동차 잉여현금흐름 72억 달러

keyPoints.text: 2025년 연간 EBIT-adjusted 127억 달러(가이던스 상단 초과); 순이익 27억 달러; 조정 자동차 잉여현금흐름 72억 달러
2026년 연간 가이던스: EBIT-adjusted 103억~117억 달러; 자동차 영업현금흐름 192억 달러 이상; EPS-adjusted 주당 8.3달러~10.6달러 범위
이사회가 분기 배당을 주당 0.18달러로 인상(기존 대비 0.03달러 증가); 60억 달러 규모의 자사주 매입 프로그램 신규 승인

riskChanges.text: 2026년 순이익 가이던스 27억~33억 달러, EPS-diluted 주당 2.7달러~3.3달러 — 관세·무역 정책 불확실성으로 범위가 광범위

businessChanges.text: 2025년 연간 EBIT-adjusted 127억 달러로 가이던스 상단 초과 달성; 2026년 EBIT-adjusted 가이던스 103억~117억 달러로 설정
자사주 매입 프로그램 60억 달러 신규 승인; 분기 배당 0.18달러로 인상(전기 대비 0.03달러 증가)으로 주주환원 강화

financialHighlights.text: 2025년 연간 EBIT-adjusted 127억 달러; 순이익 27억 달러; 조정 자동차 잉여현금흐름 72억 달러
2026년 가이던스 — EBIT-adjusted 103억~117억 달러; 자동차 영업현금흐름 192억 달러 이상; EPS-adjusted 주당 8.3달러~13.0달러 범위
분기 배당 0.18달러(전기 대비 0.03달러 인상); 자사주 매입 한도 60억 달러 신규 승인

watchItems.text: EPS-diluted 가이던스 2.7달러~3.3달러의 광범위한 범위는 관세·무역 정책 불확실성 규모를 시사; 실제 결과와의 괴리 방향 추적 필요
60억 달러 자사주 매입 실행 속도와 자동차 영업현금흐름 192억 달러 달성 여부가 주주가치 실현의 핵심 변수

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 gmq42025pressreleaseandfin.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 News For Release: Tuesday, January 27, 2026, at 6:30 a.m. ET GM releases 2025 financial results and 2026 guidance; Board declares dividend at 20% higher quarterly rate, and approves new $6.0 billion share repurchase authorization DETROIT – General Motors (NYSE: GM) today reported full-year 2025 net income attributable to stockholders of $2.7 billion and EBIT-adjusted of $12.7 billion. Fourth-quarter 2025 net income attributable to stockholders was a loss of $3.3 billion and EBIT-adjusted was $2.8 billion. Fourth-quarter net income was reduced by more than $7.2 billion in special charges driven primarily by a realignment of electric vehicle capacity and investments  Normalized numeric aliases: $6.0 billion = 60억 달러; $2.7 billion = 27억 달러; $12.7 billion = 127억 달러; $3.3 billion = 33억 달러; $2.8 billion = 28억 달러; $7.2 billion = 72억 달러; $6.0 = 6.0달러; $2.7 = 2.7달러; $3.3 = 3.3달러; $12.7 = 12.7달러; $2.8 = 2.8달러; $7.2 = 7.2달러.

and the reduction in the stringency of emissions regulations. The chart below summarizes GM's 2025 financial guidance and 2025 results, as well as the company's 2026 guidance, which is for a year of strong financial performance. Final 2025 Guidance 2025 Results 2026 Guidance Net income attributable to stockholders $7.7 billion - $8.3 billion $2.7 billion $10.3 billion - $11.7 billion EBIT-adjusted $12.0 billion - $13.0 billion $12.7 billion $13.0 billion - $15.0 billion Automotive operating cash flow $19.2 billion - $21.2 billion $18.7 billion $19.0 billion - $23.0 billion Adjusted  Normalized numeric aliases: $7.7 billion = 77억 달러; $8.3 billion = 83억 달러; $2.7 billion = 27억 달러; $10.3 billion = 103억 달러; $11.7 billion = 117억 달러; $12.0 billion = 120억 달러; $13.0 billion = 130억 달러; $12.7 billion = 127억 달러; $19.2 billion = 192억 달러; $10.0 billion = 100억 달러; $8.3 = 8.3달러; $13.0 = 13.0달러; $18.7 = 18.7달러; $10.6 = 10.6달러; $11.00 = 11.00달러; $3.27 = 3.27달러; $13.00 = 13.00달러; $9.75 = 9.75달러.

inclusive of the company's battery cell manufacturing joint ventures. Higher quarterly dividend rate and share repurchase authorization GM announced today that its Board of Directors has approved a $0.03 per share increase in the quarterly common stock dividend rate to $0.18 per share. GM declared a quarterly cash dividend on the company’s outstanding common stock at the new rate of $0.18 per share, payable March 19, 2026 to holders of common stock at the close of trading on March 6, 2026. The company also announced that its Board has approved a new $6.0 billion share repurchase authorization. “For several years now, GM’s strong brands and winning vehicles, as well as our technology-driven services and operating discipline, have delivered consistently strong cash generation. This has allowed us to execute all phases of our capital allocation strategy, from investing in the business  Normalized numeric aliases: $6.0 billion = 60억 달러; $0.03 = 0.03달러; $0.18 = 0.18달러; $6.0 = 6.0달러.
